jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at RINL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, RINL in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!
